title: SimRadio.configure() stores values but never sends to simulator
description: configure(freq_hz, tx_power_dbm) stores values locally but TX message only includes payload. Simulator ignores radio config. Either add CONFIG message to wire protocol, or clarify that config is local-only and update docstrings.
close_reason: Clarified configure() docstring: values are local-only and not sent to the simulator (TX carries only payload). Docstring-only; existing test_configure covers local storage.
